settings.heading: Two decades of shipping cake nationwide

settings.title: How your cake travels
settings.panel_body:
Every order is packed by hand the morning it ships.

  • ❄️ Baked fresh, frozen solid. We freeze every cake the night before shipment so it travels cold and arrives at peak freshness.
  • 📦 Insulated and cushioned. Each cake is wrapped, sealed, and nested inside an insulated liner with gel ice packs. The shipping box is built for the journey.
  • 💌 Sealed with a story. Inside every box: a card from Stephanie, serving and storage instructions, and a freshness seal so you know it hasn't been opened.
  • ✈️ 2-Day Air, climate controlled. Most orders ship Free Nationwide 2-Day Air so your cake spends as little time in transit as possible.

settings.title: When your cake arrives
settings.panel_body:
A few minutes of care will keep it perfect until you're ready to celebrate.

📦 Open right away.

  • Inspect the box. The freshness seal should be intact.
  • The cake will be cold or partially frozen — that's intentional.
  • Remove the cake from the insulated liner and the ice packs.

❄️ Refrigerate immediately.

  • Place the cake in the refrigerator if you're not serving today.
  • For best taste, remove the cake from the fridge 30–45 minutes before serving.
  • Do not leave the cake on the counter overnight.

🍰 Serving and storage.

  • Cut with a clean knife, wiping between slices for the best presentation.
  • Store leftovers refrigerated in an airtight container for up to 7 days.
  • You can freeze slices for up to 1 month.

Questions when your cake arrives? Call us at (773) 570-7676. We answer.

settings.title: Before you order
settings.teaser: A few honest things to know.
settings.panel_body:
We're upfront about what nationwide shipping can and can't do.

🚫 No cake writing on shipped cakes. Lettering and decorations don't survive a 2-day journey. For "Happy Birthday" cakes, we recommend local pickup or delivery.

⏱️ We can't guarantee specific delivery times. UPS gives us a delivery date, not an hour. Plan to be home or have someone available that day.

🍰 Some flavors don't ship. We've kept the shipping menu focused on what we know travels beautifully. If you want something not on the shipping list, call or email us first — we'll let you know what's possible.

Questions about your order? Call (773) 570-7676 or email shipping@brownsugarbakery.com

settings.question: How long does the cake stay fresh after it arrives?
settings.answer: Refrigerated, our cakes are at their best within 5–7 days of delivery. We recommend taking the cake out of the fridge 30–45 minutes before serving so it comes to room temperature — that's when the caramel really sings. You can also freeze slices for up to a month if you want to stretch it.

settings.question: Do you ship in the summer or during heat waves?
settings.answer: Yes — but carefully. From late May through September, every cake ships with insulated liners and gel ice packs, and we recommend 2-Day Air so the box doesn't sit on a porch in the heat. If your delivery zone is in a heat wave the week you order, we'll reach out before we ship. We'd rather hold the order a day than send you a melted cake.

settings.question: What happens if I'm not home when the cake arrives?
settings.answer: UPS will leave the package at the door if it's a safe location. The insulated liner and ice packs will keep the cake cold for several hours. If you know you'll be away that day, leave a note in the order with delivery instructions, or have a neighbor watch for the box. Refrigerate as soon as possible after pickup.

settings.question: Can I change the shipping address after placing an order?
settings.answer: If we haven't packed the order yet, yes — call us at (773) 570-7676 right away and we'll update it. Once a cake is packed and labeled (usually the morning of ship day), the address is locked. UPS rerouting fees may apply if a change is needed in transit.

settings.question: What if the cake arrives damaged?
settings.answer: Take a photo of the box and the cake exactly as it arrived, then call us at (773) 570-7676 or email shipping@brownsugarbakery.com within 48 hours. We stand behind every cake — if something went wrong in transit, we'll make it right with a replacement or a refund.
